image_headline: THE GOVCON TIMELINE NOBODY SHOWS YOU.
image_prompt: Infographic timeline layout. Bold headline top: 'THE GOVCON TIMELINE NOBODY SHOWS YOU.' Horizontal winding road/path from left to right with 5 milestone markers: '1-2 Months' (SAM icon), '3-6 Months' (document review icon), '6-12 Months' (award badge icon), '9-18 Months' (handshake icon), '12-24 Months' (dollar sign icon). Each milestone has a 2-word label below. Right side: illustrated professional man in suit looking at a calendar with determined expression. Bottom callout box dark navy: 'YEAR 3 PAYS FOR YEAR 1'. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
